capabilityBoundary: format documentation plus deterministic fixtures; provider, hardware, operations, and field maturity remain separate

gatewayApi.versionRule: pre-1.0 gateway package SemVer; independently versioned response documents retain their own format versions

gatewayEvents.versionRule: pre-1.0 gateway package SemVer; consumers ignore additive event fields and unknown stage values

deploymentManifest.versionRule: environment, source, artifact, non-secret configuration, versioned secret-reference, ownership, evidence, promotion, and authority meanings are major-version semantics

hardenedRuntime.versionRule: base-image identity, application targets and identities, writable paths, network and port boundaries, file-mounted secret authority, probes, least privilege, resource limits, graceful termination, and evidence nonclaims are major-version semantics

hardenedRuntimePublication.versionRule: registry/image identity, protected source, digest-only publication, SBOM/provenance/vulnerability evidence, independent pull, runtime verification, and managed/live nonclaims are major-version semantics

observabilityEvent.versionRule: event identity, trusted correlation, clock/source/version binding, field allowlist, redaction exclusions, and metric-cardinality rules are major-version semantics

observabilityDeliveryBatch.versionRule: accepted event majors, envelope fields, batch identity, byte/count limits, endpoint trust, retry/spool behavior, lifecycle, product-authority independence, and custody nonclaims are major-version semantics

fileCatalogRow.versionRule: v1 is one declared voltage per thrust table; v2 requires voltage on every performance point and forbids mixed table/point voltage authority

policyTensor.versionRule: exact scalar layouts, tensor names/shapes, coordinate frame, action meaning, and rate authority are major-version semantics

desktopRecorderArchive.versionRule: archive manifest, exact five-file layout, canonical ordered frame codec and aggregate bounds, sparse-index offsets, replay finalization/reconstruction, capture/privacy/non-attestation flags, and receipt hash/import-refusal semantics are major-version authority

desktopRecorderMaterialization.versionRule: the sanitized five-file upload plan, private checksum-bound object roles, native same-origin streaming upload receipt, gateway object-integrity state, and false archive-semantics/device/field/sharing/training authority are major-version semantics

recorderArchiveAdmission.versionRule: sovereign native archive verification, exact materialization/model/replay bindings, object-backed telemetry reference semantics, and false device/field/sharing/training authority are major-version semantics

desktopRecorderCustody.versionRule: the hash-pinned purpose-limited Ed25519 public trust bundle, at-most-eight-hour exact acceptance authorization and authorization-byte digest, native two-port start/stop D55 identity/UID/descriptor/response-transcript continuity, canonical receipt binding, separate create-new proof, and permanent device/recorded-device/field/sharing/training nonclaims are major-version semantics

workerArtifacts.versionRule: forge-workers package SemVer until an artifact family receives an independent schema version

workerEnvelope.externalPublicationRule: forge-workers package SemVer until an artifact family receives an independent schema version

families.notes: Structured row/publishable/reviewQueue result; no artifactKind discriminator in the internal envelope.

The artifact remains fixture maturity; its delivery subpath has protected sandbox proof. The retained envelope is byte-free and job-bound, exact digest-addressed ONNX bytes use S3-compatible storage, and the hover fixture is executable; unsupported fixture tasks remain held.

The legacy adapter retains a held dataset/warmstart envelope. The native command executes exact source-bound behavior cloning followed by recipe-owned randomized PPO and emits a normal policy envelope; the unchanged scorecard remains the sole export authority.

D59 adds internal forge-codesign-evaluation/1.0.0 and forge-codesign-native-evaluation/1.0.0: exact Gateway snapshot plus recomputed replace-only patch/hash lineage, sovereign validator, real Rapier 0.33.0, and two estimator-only MuJoCo 3.9.0 rollouts. D60/D63 add forge-codesign-search-plan/2.0.0, p9-search-plan-evidence/2.0.0, and forge-codesign-proposal-runtime-authority/1.0.0: real pinned cmaes 0.13.0 and Optuna TPE 4.9.0 emit 100 proposals each while exact-runtime authority partitions replay/cache/recovery. Protected D64 v3 binds exact equipped catalog battery revisions, row/review/license authority, and 200-row same-authority recovery. Protected D65 adds trainingMuJoCoBundle 3.0.0, forge-training-catalog-physics/1.0.0, forge-codesign-engine-batch/4.0.0, and forge-codesign-training-authority/1.0.0: exact catalog mass/inertia and compiled MuJoCo mass closure are bound per rollout, while bench tables are used only when battery-voltage and prop applicability match. Protected D67 adds trainingMuJoCoBundle 4.0.0, forge-training-catalog-physics/2.0.0, forge-training-catalog-curve-readback/1.0.0, forge-codesign-engine-batch/5.0.0, and forge-codesign-training-authority/2.0.0: every SI bench point is retained and Python independently reconstructs all 101 curve points before table-driven authority. A controlled-synthetic v2 grid proves this path; the current 6S/5x4.6 row remains v1, retained, and rejected for the 4S/5x4.3 fixture, whose analytic fallbacks stay explicit. The lane remains outside the queue and does not prove sourced applicable catalog thrust, owner review, portable recovery, an overnight/provider-billed schedule, trained finalists, build, hardware, or field authority.

D57 adds internal forge-ghost-overlay/1.0.0: a bounded ten-minute/6,001-point indexed Y-up/SI view with controlled-synthetic or unverified maturity and permanent device/recorded-device/field nonclaims. Raw recorder frames remain object-backed.
